flow_points: Sri Lanka posted a strong Powerplay total of 61 runs.
They lost 1 wicket during their Powerplay phase.
Zimbabwe responded with a solid Powerplay performance, scoring 55 runs.
Crucially, Zimbabwe did not lose any wickets in their Powerplay.
BJ Bennett anchored Zimbabwe's innings, contributing significantly.
Bennett was responsible for 34.6% of Zimbabwe's total runs.
AG Cremer exerted sustained defensive pressure for Zimbabwe.
Cremer's impactful performance was highlighted by a score of 85.91.
Zimbabwe ultimately secured the match victory.
